summary: Implemented the 4-phase, markdown-only plan for task 99 (ryzen_docs_niri_framing). Phase 1 created docs/ryzen-ai-300.md, merging the canonical compatibility.md structure with the two unique facts from support-summary.md (hardware.cpu.amd.updateMicrocode line, ./scripts/build-usb-installer.sh step) and dropping the stale Repository Status and Created Comprehensive Guide sections. Phase 2 deleted both original Ryzen docs (docs/ryzen-ai-300-compatibility.md, docs/ryzen-ai-300-support-summary.md) and repointed the 3 live inbound links (docs/README.md:37-38 collapsed to one entry, docs/usb-installer.md:774), leaving historical specs/ references untouched. Phase 3 reframed docs/niri.md's Recommended Usage Strategy section (previously lines 95-113) from testing-phase 3-stage migration framing to permanent dual-session daily-driver framing, confined to that section with no emoji or other-section changes (verified via git diff). Phase 4 verification grep confirmed zero hits for either deleted filename outside specs/ and .git, and confirmed both new inbound links resolve correctly.

artifacts.summary: New consolidated AMD Ryzen AI 300 Series Support doc
Collapsed 2 Ryzen doc links into 1 pointing at ryzen-ai-300.md
Reframed Recommended Usage Strategy section to permanent dual-session framing

continuation_context: Implementation complete and verified. docs/ryzen-ai-300-compatibility.md and docs/ryzen-ai-300-support-summary.md are deleted from disk (git rm staged, not committed per orchestrator_mode). No .nix files were touched, so no nix flake check gate was required. All Testing & Validation checklist items in the plan are checked off. state.json updated to status=completed with completion_summary and plan/summary artifacts added; TODO.md regenerated. No git commit was made — orchestrator_mode is true, so committing (scoped to this task's file set: docs/ryzen-ai-300.md, docs/ryzen-ai-300-compatibility.md removal, docs/ryzen-ai-300-support-summary.md removal, docs/README.md, docs/usb-installer.md, docs/niri.md, specs/099_ryzen_docs_niri_framing/, specs/TODO.md, specs/state.json) is left to the orchestrator.
